name: Counterfeit Curse (Blush of Life)
description: Creates a potion that grants the drinker the appearance of life for one scene — warm skin, flushed complexion, beating heart. The effect mimics the Blush of Life that thin-bloods can naturally produce.
ingredients: The alchemist's vitae mixed with warm milk and a drop of mortal blood

name: Counterfeit Curse (Envelop)
description: Creates an inhalable powder that, when thrown, produces a choking fog around a target. The target suffers a 2-die penalty to all actions for 3 turns. Affects mortals and vampires alike.

name: Counterfeit Curse (Haze)
description: Creates a vial that, when broken, fills a 10-meter area with thick fog. All ranged attacks through the fog suffer a 3-die penalty. The fog disperses after one scene or strong wind.
ingredients: Thin-blood vitae, dry ice, sealed glass vial

name: Far Reach Draught
description: A potion that grants telekinetic ability for one scene. The drinker can manipulate objects up to 10 meters away with Strength 1. Requires concentration — other actions suffer a 2-die penalty while maintaining Far Reach.
ingredients: Thin-blood vitae, iron filings, lodestone dust

name: Portable Panacea
description: A healing salve that mends 2 Superficial Health damage when applied to a wound. Works on mortals and vampires. Can be stored for up to one week before losing potency. One dose per brewing.

name: Tongue of the Asp
description: A tincture applied to the tongue that allows the drinker to perfectly mimic any voice they have heard for one scene. Useful for impersonation, phone calls, and deception.

name: Profane Hieros Gamos
description: An advanced formula that requires intimate contact with a full-blooded Kindred. The alchemist can temporarily acquire a level 1 power from one of that Kindred's disciplines for one scene.
ingredients: The alchemist's vitae mixed with vitae from the source Kindred, intimate physical contact

name: Night's Touch
description: A black paste that, when applied to a weapon, causes it to deal Aggravated damage to vampires for one scene. The weapon appears normal but feels unnaturally cold.

name: Airborne Momentum Elixir
description: A potion that grants flight for one scene. The drinker can levitate, hover, and fly at walking speed. Maximum altitude approximately 100 meters. Extremely conspicuous — a major Masquerade risk.
ingredients: Thin-blood vitae, mercury, feathers from a bird of prey

name: Defractionate Compound
description: Separates vitae into purified components. Produces one of: a healing draught (mend 3 Superficial), a courage serum (+2 frenzy resistance), an alertness tincture (+2 Perception), or a vitae purifier (cleanse Blood Bond influence). Choose during brewing.
ingredients: Thin-blood vitae, laboratory glassware, chemical reagents specific to the desired effect

name: Sunscreen Potion
description: A topical application that provides limited protection from sunlight for 10 minutes. Reduces sunlight damage by half (round down). Does not prevent Rotschreck. Only works for thin-bloods; full-blooded Kindred gain no benefit.
ingredients: Thin-blood vitae, SPF 100 sunscreen, crushed amber, morning dew collected before sunrise

name: Counterfeit Discipline (Lesser)
description: Brews a potion that grants a Level 1-2 Discipline power from any discipline to the drinker for one scene. The brewing requires specialized ingredients related to the power being replicated. Remains potent for one week.
ingredients: Thin-blood vitae, ingredients thematically linked to the discipline (fangs for Potence, predator eyes for Auspex, etc.)

name: Fixatio
description: A permanent formula that binds a thin-blood alchemical effect to an object rather than a person. The object becomes a one-use talisman — a ring that grants Far Reach when worn, a blade permanently coated in Night's Touch, etc. Extremely time-consuming.
ingredients: Thin-blood vitae, the target object (must be of quality craftsmanship), reagents worth at least $500

name: Counterfeit Discipline (Greater)
description: As Counterfeit Discipline (Lesser), but can replicate Level 3-4 Discipline powers. The brewing is extremely difficult and the ingredients rare and expensive. Remains potent for 3 nights. Cannot replicate Level 5 or Amalgam powers.
ingredients: Thin-blood vitae, rare and morally questionable ingredients specific to the power

name: Awaken the Sleeper
description: The most ambitious formula — temporarily elevates the alchemist's Blood Potency to 1 for one scene, granting them access to Blood Surge at normal power. During this time, they also suffer the full effects of a clan bane (chosen at creation). When the effect ends, the alchemist must make a Hunger Frenzy check.
ingredients: Thin-blood vitae, vitae from a Kindred of generation 10 or lower, rare alchemical reagents worth $1000+, a personal sacrifice (1 Aggravated damage)
